title: Deluxe Paws Christmas Gingerbread Man Plush, 20cm Soft Brown Stuffed Figure with Santa Hat, Red Bow Tie, White Lace Trim, Holiday Decoration
features: FESTIVE DESIGN: Adorable gingerbread man plush toy featuring a red Santa hat, white lace trim details, and charming red bow tie for perfect holiday decor
SIZE AND MATERIAL: 20cm tall soft plush figure made with premium brown fabric, ideal for cuddling and holiday displays
HOLIDAY DETAILS: Decorated with festive embellishments including red and green buttons, embroidered smile, and rosy cheeks for classic Christmas charm
QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Carefully stitched with durable materials and secure attachments, suitable for ages 3 years and above
VERSATILE USE: Perfect as a Christmas decoration, collectible holiday plush, or festive gift that brings warmth to any holiday setting
description: Bring festive cheer to your holiday celebrations with this adorable 15cm gingerbread man plush toy. This charming Christmas decoration features soft brown plush material, adorned with a jolly Santa hat trimmed with fluffy white fur. The delightful details include decorative white lace trim, a festive red bow tie, and traditional gingerbread man styling with embroidered facial features and buttons. Perfect as both a decorative piece and a cuddly companion, this plush figure captures the magical spirit of the holiday season. The soft, huggable texture makes it an ideal Christmas gift for children and collectors alike. The carefully crafted design includes classic gingerbread man elements while maintaining a contemporary appeal. At 15 centimetres in height, it's the perfect size for displaying on shelves, beds, or anywhere that needs a touch of Christmas magic. The durable construction ensures this cheerful character will bring joy throughout the holiday season and beyond.
